title: Tinkers Reforged
description: Add new Materials To Tinkers Construct
body:
# Tinkers Reforged 

Tinkers Reforged add 10 new metals to tinkers construct that be used as tinkers materials.

Each having their own ability

Here the list of metals added by tinkers reforged on 1.20.1 : 
- slimebronze
- graphite
- yttrium
- astatine
- barium
- tellurium
- actinium
- thallium
- germanium
- berkelium
